tool_args.label: LIRR Board approval sought for Option 3 Siemens dual-mode locomotive contract

payload.description: Long Island Rail Road seeks Board approval to exercise Option 3 of the contract awarded to Siemens Mobility, Inc. for the design, manufacturing, testing, and delivery of up to 44 dual-mode locomotives in the amount of $787.5M

tool_args.label: Metro-North seeks approval for NY Waterway ferry contract

payload.description: Metro-North seeks Board approval for a competitively solicited miscellaneous service contract with three two-year options in the not-to-exceed amount of $44.3M to Port Imperial Ferry Corp. d/b/a NY Waterway to provide ferry and ancillary services for the Haverstraw-Ossining and Newburgh-Beacon routes

tool_args.label: Metro-North and LIRR seek approval for BBM Railway Equipment contract

payload.description: Metro-North on behalf of itself and LIRR seeks Board approval of a three-year plus two one-year options contract for a non-competitive estimated quantity miscellaneous procurement contract to BBM Railway Equipment, LLC for preventative maintenance, inspection, repair and parts supply for car hoists and truck turntables in the estimated amount of $4.5M
